zh.lifeSummary: 當Eulalia Marche於大約1600年出生在英國戴文黑福德時，她的父親Richard Marche35歲，母親Joane Martyn27歲。她於1619年12月28日與Henry Burt在英國戴文迪恩 普萊爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她於1619年住在英國戴文迪恩 普萊爾。她去世於1690年8月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年91歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eulalia Marche于大约1600年出生在英国戴文黑福德时，她的父亲Richard Marche35岁，母亲Joane Martyn27岁。她于1619年12月28日与Henry Burt在英国戴文迪恩 普萊爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她于1619年住在英国戴文迪恩 普萊爾。她去世于1690年8月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德享年91岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾斯普林菲爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Marche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: March
meanings: English: habitational name from March (Cambridgeshire) or from any of numerous minor English placenames deriving from Middle English marche ‘boundary’ (partly from Old English mearc in the dative-case form mearce, partly from Old French marche). Compare Mark 2.
Catalan: from the personal name March, Catalan equivalent of Mark 1. This surname is also found in southern France.
German: topographic name from Middle Low German march, Middle High German marc(h) ‘mark, sign, boundary’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word (Bavaria).

nameMeanings.name: Eulalia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Greek personal name composed of eu ‘well, good’ + lalein ‘to talk’. It was very common in the Middle Ages, when it was to a large extent confused with Hilary , but is now rare.

variants.name: Eulalee
meanings: From a Late Greek personal name composed of eu ‘well, good’ + lalein ‘to talk’. It was very common in the Middle Ages, when it was to a large extent confused with Hilary , but is now rare.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Eulalia Marche was born about 1600, in Sherford, Devon, England, her father, Richard Marche, was 35 and her mother, Joane Martyn, was 27. She married Henry Burt on 28 December 1619, in Dean Prior, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 9 daughters. She lived in Dean Prior, Devon, England in 1619. She died on 29 August 1690, in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 91, and was buried in Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eulalia Marche est née environ 1600, à Sherford, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Richard Marche, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joane Martyn, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Burt le 28 décembre 1619, à Dean Prior, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 9 filles. Elle a vécu à Dean Prior, Devon, Angleterre en 1619. Elle est décédée le 29 août 1690, à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 91 ans, et a été enterrée à Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Lei sposato Henry Burt il 28 dicembre 1619, nel Dean Prior, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 9 figlie. Vissuto a Dean Prior, Devon, England nel 1619. ja.lifeSummary: Eulalia Marcheが約1600年にイギリスデボンシェルフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Marcheは35歳，母Joane Martynは27歳であった。1619年12月28日にイギリスデボンディーン プリオルでHenry Burtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1619年にはイギリスデボンディーン プリオルに住んでいた。彼女は1690年8月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドで91歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアスプリングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.Deerfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 디르필드
ko.lifeSummary: Eulalia Marche(이)가 대략 1600년 영국 데폰 셔퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Marche(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joane Martyn(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1619년 12월 28일 영국 데폰 디 프리어에서 Henry Burt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1619년도에 영국 데폰 디 프리어에서 살았다. 그녀는 1690년 8월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에서 91세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 스프링필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eulalia Marche nasceu aproximadamente 1600, em Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Marche, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joane Martyn, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Burt em 28 de dezembro de 1619, em Dean Prior, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela viveu em Dean Prior, Devon, Inglaterra em 1619. Ela faleceu em 29 de agosto de 1690, em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 91 anos, e foi sepultada em Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eulalia Marche родилась около 1600 г. в местности ширфорд, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Marche было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joane Martyn, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Burt 28 декабря 1619 г. в местности дин приор, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 9 дочерей. Она жила в местности дин приор, девон, Англия в 1619 году. Она умерла 29 августа 1690 г. в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 91 год и была похоронена в местности спрингфиелд, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eulalia Marche nació aproximadamente 1600, en Sherford, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Marche, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joane Martyn, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Henry Burt el 28 de diciembre de 1619, en Dean Prior, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 9 hijas. Vivió en Dean Prior, Devon, Inglaterra en 1619. Murió el 29 de agosto de 1690, en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 91 años, y fue sepultada en Springfield, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
